message:
refactor: wrap transcript conversion result with blob metadata

Change convertClaudeCodeTranscript and convertCodexTranscript to return
a ConversionResult object containing both the transcript and blob info
(count and sha256s) to support tracking extracted binary data.

🔮 View transcript: https://vibeinsights.dev/s/96ca8d94-8648-410b-8752-18910ea48368

files.patch:

@@ -193,12 +200,18 @@ async function loadSerializedTranscript(fileName: string) {
   });
 
   expect(transcript).not.toBeNull();
-  return serializeTranscript(transcript!);
+  return serializeResult(transcript!);
 }
 
-function serializeTranscript(transcript: UnifiedTranscript) {
+function serializeResult(result: ConversionResult) {
   return {
-    ...transcript,
-    timestamp: transcript.timestamp.toISOString(),
+    transcript: {
+      ...result.transcript,
+      timestamp: result.transcript.timestamp.toISOString(),
+    },
+    blobs: {
+      count: result.blobs.size,
+      sha256s: [...result.blobs.keys()].sort(),
+    },
   };
 }
